meta.title: Types of AI Models for Robots
meta.description:

Video Links:
- HuggingFace SO-101 docs: https://github.com/TheRobotStudio/SO-ARM100
- Ender 3 V3 SE printer: https://store.creality.com/eu/products/ender-3-v3-se-3d-printer
- Bambu A1 printer: https://eu.store.bambulab.com/products/a1?from=navigation
